case_title: MIRANDA MANEY VS. SQUARE PANDA, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,201.24 FILED BY MANEY, MIRANDA AS TO DEFENDANT SQUARE PANDA, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-07-2019 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD." COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SQUARE PANDA, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT SQUARE PANDA, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($0.00) SERVED DEC-06-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SQUARE PANDA, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-07-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-07-2019 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF MIRANDA MANEY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SQUARE PANDA, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DEBBIE HEIMOWITZ, SUPERVISED POINT OF CONTACT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-07-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MANEY, MIRANDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SQUARE PANDA, INC. $4,140.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,205.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF: $4140 FOR UNPAID INVOICE. THE CONTACT BETWEEN THE PARTIES PROVIDED FOR PAYMENT ON AN HOURLY BASIS AND DID NOT INCLUDE ANY RIGHT TO REFUSE PAYMENT FOR DISSATISFACTION WITH WORK. DEFENDANT CANNOT RELY ON INDUSTRY CUSTOM IN A CONTRACT WITH A MERGER CLAUSE---I.E. THE CONTRACT ITSELF SAYS THAT IT IS THE FULL AGREEMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MANEY, MIRANDA AS TO DEFENDANT SQUARE PANDA, INC.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
